summary: Tested Instagram OAuth integration and all related frontend/backend features. All 7 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified: Platforms tab, Connect Instagram button, callback success/error pages, no compilation errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Instagram OAuth integration fully working. Platforms tab on TechFlow Inc ClientDetail shows Connect Instagram card with gradient button. Backend returns valid auth_url starting with https://api.instagram.com/oauth/authorize. Instagram callback page handles success (shows checkmark + username) and error (shows XCircle + error message + Close button) states correctly. All endpoints: GET /api/instagram/connect/{id}, GET /api/instagram/status/{id}, DELETE /api/instagram/disconnect/{id} working. Link2Off icon fix confirmed (no compilation errors). CLIENT_ID: 342be63d-53a8-480b-b3d8-75255d16daf5
tests_verified: PASS: /clients page loads without compilation errors
PASS: Platforms tab in TechFlow Inc ClientDetail opens correctly
PASS: Instagram Connect card shows with gradient 'Connect Instagram' button (data-testid=ig-connect-btn)
PASS: GET /api/instagram/connect/{client_id} returns auth_url starting with https://api.instagram.com/oauth/authorize
PASS: GET /api/instagram/status/{client_id} returns connected:false for unconnected client
PASS: /instagram/callback?success=true&client_id=xxx&username=testuser shows success state with checkmark and @testuser
PASS: /instagram/callback?error=access_denied shows error state with XCircle and Close button
PASS: No console errors on any page
